\\

\\
{\color[RGB]{240, 0, 0} \text{第一步}:\text{考察}a_1=x\left( \cos \sqrt{x}-1 \right) }
\\
\text{由}\cos x\text{的泰勒展开可得}1-\cos x~\frac{1}{2}x^2,\text{故}x\left( \cos \sqrt{x}-1 \right) =-x\cdot \frac{1}{2}\left( \sqrt{x} \right) ^2=-\frac{1}{2}x^2.
\\
{\color[RGB]{240, 0, 0} \text{第二步}:\text{考察}a_2=\sqrt{x}\ln \left( 1+\sqrt[3]{x} \right) }
\\
\text{由}\ln \left( 1+x \right) ~x\text{得}\left. \sqrt{x}\ln \left( 1+\sqrt[3]{x} \right) =\sqrt{x}\cdot \sqrt[3]{x} \right) =x^{\frac{1}{2}}x^{\frac{1}{3}}=x^{\frac{5}{6}}.
\\
{\color[RGB]{240, 0, 0} \text{第三步}:\text{考察}a_3=\sqrt[3]{x+1}-1}
\\
\text{由}\left( 1+x \right) ^{\alpha}-1~\alpha x\text{得}\sqrt[3]{x+1}-1\sim \frac{1}{3}x.
\\
\text{综上可得},\text{选（B）}.
\\

\\

QuestionTxt:
设$f\left( x \right) =\lim\limits_{n\rightarrow \infty} \frac{1+x}{1+x^{2n}},$则$f\left( x \right) \left( \quad\;\; \right)$
$\left( \mathrm{A} \right)$ 无间断点.
$\left( \mathrm{B} \right)$ 有间断点$x=1.$
$\left( \mathrm{C} \right)$ 有间断点$x=-1.$
$\left( \mathrm{D} \right)$ 有间断点$x=0.$
AnswerTxt:
$$
\\
\text{【解析】}
\\
\text{当}|x|<1\text{时，}f\left( x \right) =\lim\limits_{n\rightarrow \infty} \frac{1+x}{1+x^{2n}}=1+x\text{；}{\color[RGB]{0, 0, 240} //\text{当}|x|<1\text{时，}f\left( x \right) =\lim\limits_{n\rightarrow \infty} x^{2n}=0,\text{则}\lim\limits_{n\rightarrow \infty} \frac{1+x}{1+x^{2n}}=\frac{1+x}{1+0}=1+x}
\\
\text{当}|x|>1\text{时，}f\left( x \right) =\lim\limits_{n\rightarrow \infty} \frac{1+x}{1+x^{2n}}=0\text{；}  {\color[RGB]{0, 0, 240} //\text{当}|x|>1\text{时，}\lim\limits_{n\rightarrow \infty} x^{2n}=+\infty \text{，则}\lim\limits_{n\rightarrow \infty} \frac{1}{1+x^{2n}}=0}
\\
\text{当}x=-1\text{时，}f\left( x \right) =\lim\limits_{n\rightarrow \infty} \frac{1+x}{1+x^{2n}}=0\text{；}
\\
\text{当}x=1\text{时，}f\left( x \right) =\lim\limits_{n\rightarrow \infty} \frac{1+x}{1+x^{2n}}=\lim\limits_{n\rightarrow \infty} \frac{1+1}{1+1^{2n}}=1.
\\
\text{于是}f\left( x \right) =\left\{ \begin{array}{c}
	\begin{matrix}
	1+x,&		|x|<1\text{，}\\
	0,&		|x|>1\text{，}\\
	0.&		x=-1\text{，}\\
	1,&		x=1\text{，} \\
\end{matrix}\\
\end{array} \right. 
\\
\text{有}f\left( 1 \right) =1\text{，}f\left( 1-0 \right) =1+x=2\text{，}f\left( 1+0 \right) =0,
\\
f\left( -1 \right) =0\text{，}f\left( -1-0 \right) =0\text{，}f\left( -1+0 \right) =1+x=0,
\\
\text{因此}x=1\text{为函数}f\left( x \right) \text{的间断点，选（B）}.
\\

\\
{\color[RGB]{240, 0, 0} \text{【欧几里得出品}\left( \text{杨超老师} \right) \text{】}}
$$
LinkNames: 函数的间断点,含参变量的极限,连续与间断

\\

\\
\frac{\partial z}{\partial x}=\frac{1}{2\sqrt{x}\left( \sqrt{x}+\sqrt{y} \right)}\text{，}\frac{\partial z}{\partial y}=\frac{1}{2\sqrt{y}\left( \sqrt{x}+\sqrt{y} \right)}\text{，}

设$x\in \left( 0,1 \right) ，$证明下列不等式：
$\left( 1 \right)$$\left( 1+x \right) \ln ^2\left( 1+x \right) <x^2;$
$\left( 2 \right)$$\frac{1}{\ln 2}-1<\frac{1}{\ln \left( 1+x \right)}-\frac{1}{x}<\frac{1}{2}.$
AnswerTxt:
$$
\\
\text{【证】}
\\
\left( 1 \right) \text{令}\varphi \left( x \right) =x^2-\left( 1+x \right) \ln ^2\left( 1+x \right) \text{，有}\varphi \left( 0 \right) =0\text{，}
\\
\varphi '\left( x \right) =2x-\ln ^2\left( 1+x \right) -2\ln \left( 1+x \right) \text{，}\varphi '\left( 0 \right) =0.
\\
\varphi ''\left( x \right) =\frac{2}{1+x}\left[ x-\ln \left( 1+x \right) \right] >0\text{，}x\in \left( 0,1 \right) \text{，}    {\color[RGB]{0, 0, 240} //x\in \left( 0,1 \right) \text{时，}x>\ln \left( 1+x \right) }
\\
\text{知}\varphi '\left( x \right) \text{单调增加，从而}\varphi '\left( x \right) >\varphi '\left( 0 \right) =0\text{，}
\\
\text{则}\varphi \left( x \right) \text{单调增加，则}\varphi \left( x \right) >\varphi \left( 0 \right) =0\text{，}
\\
\text{即}\left( 1+x \right) \ln ^2\left( 1+x \right) <x^2.
\\
\left( 2 \right) \text{令}f\left( x \right) =\frac{1}{\ln \left( 1+x \right)}-\frac{1}{x}\text{，}x\in (0,1]\text{，则有}f\left( 1 \right) =\frac{1}{\ln 2}-1,
\\
f'\left( x \right) =\frac{\left( 1+x \right) \ln ^2\left( 1+x \right) -x^2}{x^2\left( 1+x \right) \ln ^2\left( 1+x \right)}.   
\\
\text{分母恒正，再利用（}1\text{）的结论，}\left( 1+x \right) \ln ^2\left( 1+x \right) <x^2\text{，}
\\
\text{所以，当}x\in \left( 0,1 \right) \text{时}f'\left( x \right) <0\text{，知}f\left( x \right) \text{单调减少，从而}f\left( x \right) >f\left( 1 \right) =\frac{1}{\ln 2}-1.
\\
\text{又因为}\lim\limits_{x\rightarrow 0^+} f\left( x \right) =\lim\limits_{x\rightarrow 0^+} \frac{x-\ln \left( 1+x \right)}{x\ln \left( 1+x \right)}=\lim\limits_{x\rightarrow 0^+} \frac{x-\ln \left( 1+x \right)}{x^2}\xlongequal{\text{洛必达}}\lim\limits_{x\rightarrow 0^+} \frac{x}{2x\left( 1+x \right)}=\frac{1}{2}.
\\
\text{又}f\left( x \right) \text{单调递减，则}f\left( x \right) <f\left( 0^+ \right) =\frac{1}{2}\text{，}
\\
\text{所以}\frac{1}{\ln 2}-1<\frac{1}{\ln \left( 1+x \right)}-\frac{1}{x}<\frac{1}{2}.
$$

求$\lim\limits_{x\rightarrow 0} \frac{\left( 1+x \right) ^{\frac{1}{x}}-\left( 1+2x \right) ^{\frac{1}{2x}}}{\sin x}.$
AnswerTxt:
$$
\\
\text{【解析】}
\\
\lim\limits_{x\rightarrow 0} \frac{\left( 1+x \right) ^{\frac{1}{x}}-\left( 1+2x \right) ^{\frac{1}{2x}}}{\sin x}
\\
=\lim\limits_{x\rightarrow 0} \left[ \frac{\left( 1+x \right) ^{\frac{1}{x}}}{x}-\frac{\left( 1+2x \right) ^{\frac{1}{2x}}}{x} \right] 
\\
=\lim\limits_{x\rightarrow 0} \left[ \left( 1+x \right) ^{\frac{1}{x}}\cdot \frac{x-\left( 1+x \right) \ln \left( 1+x \right)}{x^2\left( 1+x \right)}-\frac{1}{2}\left( 1+2x \right) ^{\frac{1}{2x}}\cdot \frac{2x-\left( 1+2x \right) \ln \left( 1+2x \right)}{x^2\left( 1+2x \right)} \right] \text{，}     {\color[rgb]{0, 0, 240}  //\text{洛必达法则：对}\frac{\left( 1+x \right) ^{\frac{1}{x}}}{x}\text{、}\frac{\left( 1+2x \right) ^{\frac{1}{2x}}}{x}\text{分子分母同时求导}}
\\
\text{又}\lim\limits_{x\rightarrow 0} \frac{x-\left( 1+x \right) \ln \left( 1+x \right)}{x^2\left( 1+x \right)}=\lim\limits_{x\rightarrow 0} \frac{-\ln \left( 1+x \right)}{2x\left( 1+x \right) +x^2}=\lim\limits_{x\rightarrow 0} \frac{-x}{2x\left( 1+x \right) +x^2}=-\frac{1}{2},
\\
\lim\limits_{x\rightarrow 0} \frac{1}{2}\cdot \frac{2x-\left( 1+2x \right) \ln \left( 1+2x \right)}{x^2\left( 1+2x \right)}=\lim\limits_{x\rightarrow 0} \frac{1}{2}\cdot \frac{2-\left( 2\ln \left( 1+2x \right) +2 \right)}{2x\left( 1+2x \right) +2x^2}=-1\text{，故原极限}=\frac{e}{2}
\\

\\
{\color[rgb]{240, 0, 0} \text{【欧几里得出品（石延杰老师）】}}
$$
